name: Mini Pupkin Biscuits
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 425°F.
2. Mix together the first six ingredients and set aside.
3. Blend together the pureed pumpkin, firm silken tofu, and maple syrup until smooth.
4. Add this mixture to the dry ingredients.
5. Stir in the soy milk, tablespoon by tablespoon, until the dough forms a ball.
6. Roll out the dough to 3/4-inch thickness.
7. Cut with a cookie cutter.
8. Bake for 10 minutes, or until golden. Serve immediately.
